title: Maritime Contract Management Executive - Physical Commodities (Up to $4800) #NKA
description:
Location: Millenia Tower

Duration: 1 year contract

Working Hours: Mon - Fri, 9 - 6

Salary: Up to $4800

Job Responsibilities:

Reporting to the Supervisor, Contract Management, the Contractor position is responsible for supporting the functions of Contract Management in the Asia Pacific region. This role will involve coordinating and maintaining the trading agreements which support the buying and selling of physical crude oil, refined products, and renewable products.

  • Handle legal contracts (e.g. Purchase and Sales Agreement, Storage Agreements, Tenders etc.)
  • Co-ordinate negotiations with third parties around any contract discrepancies.
  • Responsible for negotiation and management of Brokerage Agreement, Clearing Broker Agreement, and Brokers’ commission.
  • Evaluate and enhance processes, rules and protocols for administration and execution of contracts and agreements.
  • Effective communicator who shares knowledge proactively and has the ability to effectively interact in a team environment.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor of Business, Commerce, Maritime Studies, Laws, Supply Chain Management or any related field
  • Knowledge and experience of the energy market in Asia.
  • Experience in drafting and reviewing contracts and agreements would be an advantage.
  • Strong interpersonal and networking skills with strong verbal and written communication skills
  • Results oriented with ability to think and act decisively and independently under situations of extreme pressure and change.
  • Possess teamwork ability, ability to work in a small team and provide cover for other team members.

Ally
The Outsourcing Team
Recruit Express Pte Ltd
EA: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
